title: [Apache Flink 1.11.3 Released](</2020/12/18/apache-flink-1.11.3-released/>)
summary:
#  Apache Flink 1.11.3 Released
December 18, 2020 - Xintong Song
The Apache Flink community released the third bugfix version of the Apache Flink 1.11 series.
This release includes 151 fixes and minor improvements for Flink 1.11.2. The list…
